dim_bottle.title: Craft and use a Dimensional Bottle (Dimensional Tears mod) — replaces flint & steel for portal ignition

portal_network.title: Set up a 3-portal network with Dimensional Tears — Overworld, Nether, and one custom dimension link

subtitle.text: Flint and steel tears a hole. The bottle seals it before it tears further. Different philosophies. Same portal.

description: CH.11 · DIMENSIONAL TEARS
▸ Dimensional Tears replaces flint and steel
as the portal ignition item.
Instead of striking fire, you seal the tear
between dimensions with a prepared bottle.
The bottle controls where the tear opens.
The steel did not.
◈ HOW DIMENSIONAL TEARS WORKS
└ Dimensional Bottle: crafted from glass bottle +
dimension-specific material (varies by destination)
└ Use on portal frame: ignites portal (replaces flint+steel)
└ Bottle determines WHICH dimension the portal connects to
└ Portal frame: standard obsidian frame (10 obsidian)
or larger frame for wider portals
◈ BOTTLE TYPES (DIMENSION-SPECIFIC)
└ Nether Bottle: standard Nether portal ignition
└ End Bottle: for direct End portal frame ignition
(note: End portal still needs 12 eyes — bottle is
for custom End-linked portal frames, not the stronghold)
└ Custom dimension bottles: created from specific
materials for modded dimensions (check JEI)
└ True End (Beyond the Dream): requires specific bottle
(post-portal Ch13+ content)
◈ PORTAL NETWORK ADVANTAGE
└ Dimensional Tears lets you build additional portals
at specific locations without using flint+steel
└ Home portal at base, Nether hub portal at fortress,
and supplemental portal at End outpost
└ Create Teleporters handles same-dimension fast travel
└ Dimensional Tears handles cross-dimension links
└ Combined: teleport network that spans all dimensions
▸ The first civilization to tear a dimensional hole
did not have a bottle.
They had the steel and the urgency.
The bottle is what you use when you have time
to do it correctly.
▶ Use a Dimensional Bottle to ignite a portal [check]
▶ Build a 3-portal dimensional network [check]
◇ Dimensional Tears + Create Teleporters = complete
transportation infrastructure.
No more manual portal traversal.
No more travel time in the late game.
